faqs.question: How do I download my invoice?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Billing > Invoices and click Download PDF or CSV.

faqs.question: Why was my payment declined?
faqs.answer: Common reasons: expired card, insufficient funds, or bank security block. Update payment method in Settings > Billing.

faqs.question: Can I change my billing cycle?
faqs.answer: Switch between monthly and annual billing in Settings > Billing > Plan. Annual saves 20%.
